name: questplus
description: Info on the Quest Subscription Service, Quest+

embed.title: Meta Quest +
embed.description: The below pages contain info on Meta Quest +, click each one to learn more about the program, or 'Summary' for a brief overview.

embeds.title: Summary
embeds.description: Meta Quest+ is Meta's version of Xbox Gamepass - Get 2 monthly games, selected by Meta, to add to your library each month and explore the **Games Catalog** to add even more!

embeds.title: Monthly Games
embeds.description: Meta Quest+ is Meta's version of Xbox Gamepass/Live Gold - Get 2 monthly games, selected by Meta, to add to your library each month and explore the **Games Catalog** to add even more!

embeds.title: Game Catalog
embeds.description: Meta Quest + also offers a game catalog! These games rotate in and out just like Gamepass or PS+, check back in every few months to check whats new, you can see a full list of the currently available titles [here](https://www.meta.com/experiences/section/746836817401205/)

embeds.title: Membership Deals
embeds.description: Meta Quest + includes exclusive deals for members, these include deals on hit classics such as **Superhot VR**, but will also rotate in new titles, like **Arizona Sunshine 2** and many others! Meta will also occasionally give out 30% off coupons for *any* game on the Store to subscribers!

pages.name: Do I keep my games after cancelling?
pages.title: Do I keep my games after cancelling?

embeds.title: Do I keep my games after cancelling?
embeds.description:
No, just like Xbox Gamepass or PlayStation Plus, you lose access to your games once your month is over, until your month is over you will have access to your games however.
 As soon as you resubscribe, you'll regain access to all claimed games, regardless if it's still their month or not.

embeds.title: Game Trials
embeds.description:
As of February 2025, Meta Quest + now occasionally offers Game Trials! These are random, and completely up to Meta, but they last for up to 2 weeks.
 To check if there is a current trial, check your Meta Quest + dashboard.

embeds.title: Exclusive Add-on Packs
embeds.description: As of February 2025, Horizon+ now offers Add-Ons. Sometimes these will be game content, like Walkabout Minigolf courses, and other times just cosmetics, like the Ug bundles. Currently, these only appear in-headset.

pages.name: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?
pages.title: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?

embeds.title: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?
embeds.description: At this moment, no. However this can change in the future.
